source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the diagram below, all seven of the small rectangles are congruent. If the perimeter of the large rectangle is $65$, what is its area?\n<image1>

image_dependency: 题干显式写明“diagram below”，且 requires_image=true。
text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要不在文字里。
“all seven of the small rectangles are congruent”通常需要依赖图中排布与空间关系来确定大矩形尺寸关系。
multi_step: 这类题通常需要先从图形排布推出大矩形边长比例或边长表达式，再结合周长 65 求具体边长，最后计算面积。
题干同时包含几何结构约束（7 个全等小矩形）与数值条件（大矩形周长 65），属于条件组合求解。
metadata 中 multi_solution_policy.should_push_multi_solution_agent=true，侧面支持其具备一定多步推理潜力。
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，且答案为明确数值“525/2”，便于规则化核验。
题目目标是单一面积值，最终结果格式清晰，可通过独立求解或符号计算复核。

decision_reasons: asset_registry_record shows question, answer, and primary image are all present with no recorded issues
initial_scoring_record has high image_dependency_score (0.97), verifiability_score (0.9), and solid multi_step_score (0.72)
the only risk flag is visual_layout_unseen_in_payload, but it does not indicate missing core semantic assets
